title: NADE Certification and Re-Certification Criteria
description: NADE's professional certification program (in existence since 1971) and its eligibility criteria across three categories: Disability Professional (Examiner), Disability Support Professional, and Agency Medical Consultant. Specifies minimum years of practice, education, and required medical/vocational/technical training hours per category, NADE membership and Code of Ethics adherence, and the re-certification rules (certificates valid three years; 25 CE credits for Examiners/Medical Consultants and 15 for Support Professionals). References the NADE 101 application form and links to PDF certification/re-certification applications. Scraped from the official NADE site.
update_cadence: rarely (criteria amended at national conferences; last noted update 2001)
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's Certifications page (source URL preserved). Criteria histories cite specific conferences (1971 Chicago, 1978 Salt Lake City, 1984 Austin, 2000 San Juan, 2001 Austin re-certification). Linked certification_application.pdf and Recert_application.pdf are not captured here. Professional Development chair contact (Amber Barnes) is named. No tabular data.
